title: Report-only bin inventory
outcome: archon_emit_bin_inventory walks WS_ROOT/*/bin/<workflow>/ (du -sk, fd/find file count, oldest/newest age days, recursive manifest presence/count). bin/archon-bin-report + archon bin-report dispatch + moon archon:bin-report emit registry/bin-inventory.json + BIN-INVENTORY.md (gitignored). _validate_bin_inventory soft structural check. docs/bin-archive.md + docs/README.md matrix row. 4 Plan/bin workflow dirs inventoried; read-only (no bin/ writes).
validation: moon run archon:bin-report produced 4 workflows / 0 with manifest; archon:validate PASS including bin inventory structural check; no bin/ files newer than inventory after run.
decisions: inventory root is WS_ROOT/*/bin/<workflow>/ (namespace bins), not Build/src/workspaces package bins
size via du -sk (portable); fd preferred with find fallback; no dua dependency
token_note: one inventory read replaces N du/ls/stat explorations across namespace bin/ trees
